name: Metal Flower Kids' Shelf Pink - Pillowfort™: Decorative Wall Sculpture, Flower Shaped Kids Wall Shelf, Iron Frame
description: Keep their stuff organized the fun way with this Pink Metal Flower Shelf from Pillowfort™. This wall shelf brings decorative and functional storage to their space. Designed with a fixed center shelf, it features a flower shape for a charming look, and a soft pink color to add a pretty touch to their decor. The shelf is made from metal and it's great for storing books, potted plants and decor items. Plus, it can be hung in a horizontal orientation for easy display.
